scenarios.name: No furnace replacement (baseline)
scenarios.note: Savings continues to grow at current rate. Furnace may fail unexpectedly.

scenarios.name: Standard furnace - low estimate ($4,500)
scenarios.note: Comfortable. Recovery is fast. Emergency cushion stays above $30,000 at all times.

scenarios.name: High-efficiency furnace - mid estimate ($6,500)
scenarios.note: Best value option. Rebates reduce cost. Monthly gas savings of ~$15-$25 over standard unit.

scenarios.name: High-efficiency furnace - high estimate ($8,500)
scenarios.note: Still manageable. Savings dips below $30,000 briefly but recovers by spring.

scenarios.name: Emergency replacement in winter (premium pricing, $9,800)
scenarios.note: Emergency install costs 15-25% more. Avoidable with planned replacement in October-November.

bottom_line.recommended_action: Plan replacement for October-November 2026 window. Get 2-3 written estimates. Consider high-efficiency for rebate eligibility and lower monthly gas costs.
bottom_line.decision_authority: Carlos only. No contractor has been contacted.
